page_title: Terms of Service — Content Intelligence Platform
summary_text: These terms govern your use of Content Intelligence Platform. By using our service, you agree to these terms. We offer an AI-powered platform to help content creators organize ideas and improve their creative process. Please read carefully.

s_acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
s_acceptance.p1: By accessing or using Content Intelligence Platform ("the Service", "we", "us", or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Service.
s_acceptance.p2: These Terms apply to all users, including visitors, registered users, and early access participants. By registering for early access or creating an account, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

s_description.title: Description of Service
s_description.p1: Content Intelligence Platform is a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) application that helps content creators capture ideas, generate AI-assisted content briefs, discover creative patterns, and build personal content systems.
s_description.includes: The Service includes, but is not limited to:
list: Idea capture and organization tools
AI-powered content brief generation
Creative pattern analysis and insights
Content DNA profiling
Early access program participation
s_description.p2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Service at any time, with or without notice, particularly during the early access phase.

s_accounts.title: Accounts and Registration
s_accounts.p1: To access certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information to keep it accurate.
s_accounts.p2_before: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately at
s_accounts.p2_after: of any unauthorized use of your account.
s_accounts.p3: We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, or remove content at our sole discretion.

s_early_access.title: Early Access Program
s_early_access.p1: The Service is currently in an early access phase. By joining the early access program, you acknowledge that:
list: The Service is not yet fully released and may contain bugs, errors, or incomplete features
Features, functionality, and pricing are subject to change without notice
Early access pricing is offered as a benefit and may not reflect final pricing
We may collect additional feedback and usage data to improve the Service
Access may be limited, revoked, or modified at any time during this phase
s_early_access.p2: Your participation in the early access program helps shape the final product. We appreciate your feedback and patience as we build.

s_content.title: Your Content
s_content.p1: You retain full ownership of all ideas, content, and creative materials you submit to the Service ("Your Content"). By using the Service, you grant Content Intelligence Platform a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to process, store, and display Your Content solely for the purpose of providing the Service to you.
s_content.p2: We do not claim ownership of Your Content. We will not sell, share, or use Your Content to train AI models without your explicit consent.
s_content.p3: You represent and warrant that Your Content does not violate any third-party rights, including intellectual property rights, and complies with applicable law.

s_ai.title: AI-Generated Content
s_ai.p1: The Service uses artificial intelligence to generate content briefs, insights, and suggestions based on your input. You acknowledge that:
list: AI-generated content is provided as a starting point and may require editing, review, or verification
We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of AI-generated content
You are responsible for reviewing and approving any AI-generated content before publishing or using it
AI outputs may occasionally produce unexpected or imperfect results
s_ai.p2: Content Intelligence Platform amplifies your creativity — it does not replace your judgment or creative voice.

s_payments.title: Payments and Billing
s_payments.p1: Paid features of the Service will be introduced after the early access phase. When payment features become available:
list: All payments will be processed securely through Stripe, a third-party payment processor
Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis
All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated or required by applicable law
We reserve the right to change pricing with at least 30 days' notice to existing subscribers
s_payments.p2: Early access participants who have been offered special pricing will be notified of their specific billing terms separately.

s_prohibited.title: Prohibited Use
s_prohibited.p1: You agree not to use the Service to:
list: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Infringe on the intellectual property rights of others
Generate, distribute, or promote harmful, abusive, or illegal content
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service or its systems
Use automated means to scrape, crawl, or extract data from the Service
Resell or redistribute the Service without our written permission
Impersonate any person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Service

s_ip.title: Intellectual Property
s_ip.p1: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality — including but not limited to software, design, text, graphics, and logos — are and will remain the exclusive property of Content Intelligence Platform and its licensors.
s_ip.p2: Our trademarks and trade dress may not be used in connection with any product or service without our prior written consent.

s_disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
s_disclaimer.p1: The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
s_disclaimer.p2: We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure. We make no warranty regarding the quality, accuracy, or reliability of any content generated through the Service.

s_limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
s_limitation.p1: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Content Intelligence Platform shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service.
s_limitation.p2: Our total liability to you for any claims arising under these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the twelve months preceding the claim, or $50 USD if no payments have been made.

s_termination.title: Termination
s_termination.p1_before: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us at
s_termination.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately.

s_governing.title: Governing Law
s_governing.p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Wyoming, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
s_governing.p2: Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in Wyoming. If you are located outside the United States, you agree to submit to the jurisdiction of Wyoming courts for any disputes.

s_changes.title: Changes to These Terms
s_changes.p1: We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. When we make material changes, we will notify registered users via email and update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.
s_changes.p2: Your continued use of the Service after changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, please discontinue use of the Service.

s_contact.title: Contact Us
s_contact.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
